title: $1.9 trillion asset manager T. Rowe Price bets on active management with first multi-token crypto ETF
summary: T. Rowe Price launched what it says is the industry's first actively managed multi-token spot crypto ETF, offering diversified exposure to digital assets.

title: Citadel Securities invests $400 million in Crypto.com, valuing exchange at $20 billion
summary: The exchange's first institutional funding round values it at $20 billion and will fund expansion into tokenized securities and derivatives.

title: Stripe’s $53 billion PayPal bid is a high-stakes play to own the future of digital payments
summary: If Stripe acquires PayPal, the real prize could be consumer wallets, stablecoin issuance or the infrastructure powering the next generation of digital payments.

title: Visa backs Open USD with new stablecoin platform as Circle faces fresh competition
summary: Visa launched a stablecoin platform that lets banks and fintechs issue, manage and settle digital dollars through its payments network.

title: Keyrock acquires BlockFills trading assets to expand institutional crypto business
summary: The deal adds institutional trading clients, derivatives expertise and regulatory licenses as Keyrock looks to deepen its presence in crypto capital markets.
